launches.name: Postiz
launches.tagline: Agentic social media scheduler for agents like OpenClaw
launches.description: Connect Postiz to your personal AI Agent, such as OpenClaw / Claude / nanoclaw / PaperClip, and schedule thousands of social media posts to 30+ Social media networks in one go. You can either install the Postiz SKILL and use the Postiz CLI, or use the Postiz MCP and connect it to a remote server; any connection use case is supported.

launches.name: Zed 1.0
launches.tagline: High-performance, open source, multiplayer code editor
launches.description: Fast — Written from scratch in Rust to efficiently leverage multiple CPU cores and your GPU. • Agentic — Run agents in parallel to smoothly edit files, navigate code, and run tools at native speed. • Collaborative — Chat with teammates, code together, and share your screen and project.

launches.name: Marx Finance
launches.tagline: AI agents debate the markets
launches.description: Agent first platform where autonomous AI agents discuss news, share market signals, and debate positions. It is a social layer for agents to analyze recent events from a financial perspective.

launches.name: Buda
launches.tagline: Recruit agents to run your company as a synchronous team
launches.description: OpenClaw / Hermes gave you an agent. Buda gives you a company. Recruit or sell Skills, Agents, and Teams from a Marketplace, coordinate them with an Organizer, and watch every agent work live in Browser and Terminal — all in one screen. Long-running isolated sandboxes with SSD volumes — secure by design, no Mac Mini needed. No setup, no model config. Works across Slack, Discord, WeChat, Teams, and web. Buda runs your entire company. Actually doing things.

launches.name: Genspark for Word
launches.tagline: Draft, edit, and research inside Microsoft Word with AI
launches.description: Switching between AI tools and Word kills momentum. Genspark embeds drafting, editing, research, and formatting directly inside Word for writers, analysts, and office workers.

launches.name: LaunchCut
launches.tagline: Interactive iOS Demo Builder
launches.description: This is an interactive demo builder that leverages the Xcode simulator directly from macOS. It capture what you want how you want and allows you to link hotspots (clickable areas) to screens or animations. It then allows you to either export to a self contained html file or publish to a shareable link that you can also embed into any site. This gives your landing page a interactive demo sitting right there for users!

launches.name: Montage
launches.tagline: UI Agentic framework for quicker output & less token usage
launches.description: AI agents render UI slowly, expensively, and inconsistently — and a huge chunk of inference bills gets eaten by UI generation. Montage fixes it. Your agent emits a tiny intent schema; we compile it server-side into production components. 10x faster hydration, 50-100x fewer output tokens, model-agnostic, framework-agnostic, themed to your brand. Don't let your agents reinvent UI every turn - ship them on Montage!

launches.name: nudge
launches.tagline: Drop your tasks. AI auto-schedules your whole week.
launches.description: nudge auto-schedules your entire week. Drop tasks → AI places them by deadline, around your real life. - Ready in 10 seconds. No templates. No tutorials. - Add a task in 2 seconds. Type it. AI schedules it. - Drop a TODO.md file — nudge plans your week from it. - Calendar, list, and Kanban — one fast workspace. - Schedules around your sleep, meals, gym, and deep-work hours. $5 first month. $9/mo after. Half price for students. Solo-built by a 20yo engineering student in Tokyo.

launches.name: Zush: AI File Renamer
launches.tagline: Updated: docs support, BYOK, Local AI (Ollama), Windows App
launches.description: Zush renames screenshots, PDFs, photos and documents on Mac and Windows using AI. Batch rename, watch folders, stay organized automatically. 50 free renames, no signup.

launches.name: AnyDrop
launches.tagline: AirDrop for the browser: share files, chat and sync notes
launches.description: AnyDrop is a free, purely browser-based web app that connects your devices directly. Drop files of any size, chat, and sync a live notepad across Mac, PC, iOS, and Android without any downloads or sign-ups. True P2P with zero cloud storage.

launches.name: CipherLock
launches.tagline: Learn ciphers by breaking them
launches.description: CipherLock is a minimalist interactive hub to explore cryptography. Features Caesar, Vigenère, Morse, Atbash & Rail Fence ciphers. Includes an Academy for foundations and a Daily Enigma challenge. 100% client-side, open source & privacy-focused.

launches.name: HiveTerm
launches.tagline: One workspace for Claude, Codex, Gemini and your stack
launches.description: Running 5 AI agents across 3 projects? Tabs everywhere, no idea what each one is doing. HiveTerm is one terminal workspace where Claude Code, Codex, Gemini and your dev stack run side by side. Config-driven (hive.yml), per-agent recap in the sidebar, voice input, and an MCP server so agents can spawn and talk to each other. Free to start — up to 3 projects on the free tier. macOS, Windows, Linux.

launches.name: NodeDB
launches.tagline: Vector, Graph, Array, Columnar, KV - all in one database
launches.description: One database for everything your app needs. Store user data, cache sessions, build AI search, and map relationships: all in one place. Instead of duct-taping Postgres, Redis, a Vector DB, and a Graph DB together, NodeDB gives you all of it in a single system.

launches.name: BreakGround
launches.tagline: AI that builds your product experience
launches.description: BreakGround turns your product into a guided experience—using AI. Just enter your product URL, and AI understands your UI to generate onboarding, tooltips, and in-app guidance automatically. No complex setup. No manual flows. Live in under an hour. If users struggle to understand your product, BreakGround uses AI to make it obvious.

launches.name: Citera
launches.tagline: AI agents that interview your team and ship daily content
launches.description: Buyers ask ChatGPT and Perplexity which tool to pick before they ever visit your website. Most B2B SaaS teams aren't showing up. Agencies charge $10K/mo and write generic content. AI tools do the same for less. Neither works because neither knows your team or product. Citera interviews your experts first. Then AI agents research, write, verify, and sandbox-test every article against the live winners before publishing. Expert-driven content that ranks on Google and gets cited by AI.

launches.name: Piyovee AI
launches.tagline: Turn prompts into videos, images, and more.
launches.description: Piyovee is an AI-powered creative platform that lets you generate images, videos, and voice content from simple prompts. Access multiple AI models in one place, create cinematic videos, upscale visuals, and bring your ideas to life instantly.

launches.name: Robotomail
launches.tagline: Email for AI agents
launches.description: Robotomail is a managed email server built for AI agents. One API call creates a real mailbox with full send and receive. No self-hosted mail servers, no send-only APIs. Your agent gets its own email address, webhooks for inbound processing, automatic conversation threading, and deliverability setup out of the box. Custom domains when you need them. Built for developers building AI agents and platforms hosting them. Free to start.

launches.name: Storyborrd
launches.tagline: Generative UI - where no two users see the same website
launches.description: Storyborrd turns every part of your site from the hero section and landing page to pricing and FAQs into a self-optimizing pool of variants. It generates new versions, routes each visitor to the experience most likely to convert, and continuously learns what performs best. One SDK call. No A/B test setup. Up to 50% more leads on average.

launches.name: PDF to Markdown
launches.tagline: Turn PDFs into clean, editable Markdown
launches.description: PDF to Markdown converts PDF files into clean, structured Markdown with AI OCR, layout analysis, and recovery for headings, lists, tables, links, images, and equations. Use it from the browser or API to get editable docs, notes, and LLM-ready content.

launches.name: Jungle Grid
launches.tagline: Stop picking GPUs. Ship models.
launches.description: Jungle Grid is a GPU orchestration platform for AI workloads. Submit inference, training, and batch jobs by intent, and let Jungle Grid route them across distributed GPU capacity based on fit, cost, latency, and reliability.

launches.name: Muzzly
launches.tagline: Scan dog food and know if it's safe in seconds
launches.description: Muzzly helps dog parents check if food is safe for their dog in seconds. Take a photo or search for a food, and Muzzly gives you a simple safety result with clear reasons, including what is safe, risky, or toxic. It also includes dog profiles, scan history, saved results, and support for English and Spanish. Built for quick everyday moments when you ask: "Can my dog eat this?"

launches.name: DataPull AI
launches.tagline: Extract data from any webpage using plain English prompts
launches.description: Type what you want in plain English, get a clean table in seconds. Works on any website. No CSS selectors, no setup, no code. Export to CSV, JSON, or Google Sheets. Free tier included. Powered by Claude AI.

launches.name: VoiceCatch
launches.tagline: The personal AI layer that replaces typing (runs locally)
launches.description: VoiceCatch is a privacy-first speech-to-text app with local-first transcription. Talk anywhere you type — your audio and transcripts stay on your device. Free plan, no sign-up wall.

launches.name: Shieldra
launches.tagline: Your regulatory AI that shields your business.
launches.description: Shieldra automates compliance end-to-end across HIPAA, SOC 2, and more — scanning your policies, monitoring your infrastructure, and tracking every regulatory update so you stay a step ahead of every auditor.

launches.name: Sprite
launches.tagline: AI That Makes Great Content (It's Not Magic)
launches.description: Connect your store and let Sprite run your content operation. Schema, links, photography, publishing, every day. Other AI tools hand you a Google Doc. Sprite hands you traffic. It studies your store, writes articles your customers actually search for, generates the imagery, builds the schema, links it all together, and ships it live to Shopify whilst you sleep. Set the strategy once. Wake up to a content engine that's been working all night.

launches.name: Dify Launch Desk
launches.tagline: Shape a Dify app from use case to deployment path
launches.description: Dify Launch Desk: Shape a Dify app from use case to deployment path. Choose the app type, knowledge pipeline, plugin surface, and rollout mode before your team opens the builder. Key features: Pick the first app to ship, Set the operating model, Choose the retrieval base.

launches.name: Pitstop EU AI Act Compliance Scanner
launches.tagline: August 2026. €35M penalties. Is your AI agent compliant?
launches.description: EU AI Act enforcement hits August 2, 2026. Penalties: €35M or 7% of revenue. We scanned 101 AI agents — average compliance grade: C+. 38% have zero trust scoring. Only 37% properly mask sensitive data. Our free scanner maps 27 security checks to EU AI Act Articles 9-15. Paste your config, get instant compliance gaps. No signup, runs in your browser. Also on GitHub: github.com/Iamthegreatlynchini/thepitstop-ai Built by a human + AI agent from Buenos Aires. 8 patents pending.

githubRepo.readmeSnippet:
# 🏎️ Pitstop AI Agent Security Scanner

[![GitHub Action](https://img.shields.io/badge/GitHub%20Action-v1.0.0-blue)](https://github.com/marketplace/actions/pitstop-security-scanner)
[![License: MIT](https://img.shields.io/badge/License-MIT-yellow.svg)](https://opensource.org/licenses/MIT)
[![Security: 27 Checks](https://img.shields.io/badge/Security-27%20Checks-green)](https://thepitstop.ai)

**Free, offline AI agent security scanner for CI/CD pipelines**

Scan your AI agent configuration for 2

launches.name: Azimuth
launches.tagline: Scope projects. Ship estimates.
launches.description: Azimuth turns raw client requirements into structured estimates, PRDs, TRDs, and client-ready proposals in minutes, powered by Anthropic Claude AI. Key features: 7-stage built-in CRM, one-click document generation, branded email delivery with open tracking, and self-improving AI that learns from actual vs. estimated hours. Save 4–8 hrs per proposal. 67% avg win rate improvement. White-label ready. Starts at $49/month. 14-day free trial.

launches.name: CodeAgent Mobile
launches.tagline: your IDE coding agent in your pocket
launches.description: Control your IDE AI agents remotely from your phone. Send prompts to Copilot, Claude, Windsurf, and more. Stream responses in real-time. Works with JetBrains, VS Code, and Cursor.

launches.name: AI Agent GPU Sandboxes
launches.tagline: 6 AI apps with GPU, streaming, and session memory wired in
launches.description: We just launched AI Sandboxes that run on production agent-native infrastructure that an AI-agent can spin up, operate, and evolve. Each one runs on GPU compute with streaming, session memory, and inter-service networking already wired in. This is what agent-native cloud actually means.

launches.name: AI Council
launches.tagline: Local multi-agent council that bypasses API costs.
launches.description: Tired of copy-pasting questions into 6 tabs? AI Council runs ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, and others in parallel locally. It uses DOM injection to bypass API costs, forcing AIs to peer-review each other until you get a stress-tested answer.

launches.name: AgentStatus
launches.tagline: Outside-in monitoring & validation for AI Agents
launches.description: Most monitoring runs from AWS. But your users aren't in AWS. AgentStatus validates production AI agents from real consumer devices on residential ISPs, globally. HTTP 200 doesn't mean your agent gave the right answer, we evaluate semantic correctness across multi-turn conversations, tool calls, and streaming responses. If your agents hallucinate, we notify you before your customer find out. 400+ residential nodes. 30+ regions. LLM-as-Judge evaluation. 6K+ agents and 10M+ tests. Starts free.

launches.name: Wrively
launches.tagline: AI LinkedIn posts that sound like you, not a template
launches.description: Wrively writes LinkedIn posts that sound like you. Answer 4 questions in 2 minutes. We build a Voice Layer that remembers your company, stage, audience, and personality. Every post comes from it. No more briefing ChatGPT. No more editing generic output.

launches.name: Prodigy
launches.tagline: Stop rework before it starts, prep smarter requirements
launches.description: Prodigy helps product managers and product owners prepare for refinement sessions so that development cycles start with clarity. Incomplete requirements is one of the most expensive hidden problems in software teams. Stories go into sprints half baked, developers hit blockers mid cycle, and timelines slip. With Prodigy you can: - Catch gaps and ambiguities before they reach the dev team - Reduce rework, blockers, and timeline overruns - More No more starting dev cycles hoping for the best

launches.name: Writing With - Just you and a blank page
launches.tagline: Write without the noise. Distraction-free, AI-assisted.
launches.description: Writing With is a distraction-free writing app with autosave, dark mode, cloud sync, and AI tools tucked into a hidden sidebar. Open it and write. No account needed, no overwhelming chatbots, no setup, nothing to configure. Free to start.

launches.name: Dreamfold AI: Dream Journal
launches.tagline: Your AI dream journal — understand your subconscious
launches.description: Dreamfold AI turns your dreams into Jungian psychological insights. Log by voice or text, get instant symbol & archetype breakdowns, track emotional patterns over time, and use reflection prompts to connect your inner world to your waking life. Free to download — understand your first dream tonight. Key features: 🎙️ Voice-to-text dream logging 🔮 Jungian symbol & archetype analysis 📈 Emotion tracking & pattern visualization 🌐 Dream Sphere for visual symbol exploration 🛌 Sleep tab

launches.name: XTrace MemHub
launches.tagline: Turn your GPT/Claude/Gemini history into a LLM-Wiki Mindmap
launches.description: XTrace MemHub is your context control panel for AI agents. The feature we are launching this week is building your own LLM-Wiki without coding or using Claude Code. We extract AI memory and context from your chat history, store it in an encrypted vector database, and organize it in a file system that Obsidian prefers. Now you can keep building your second brain without any cold start!

launches.name: ACE by HeadSpin
launches.tagline: AI that executes, validates, and self heals
launches.description: ACE, HeadSpin's GenAI test script generator that allows you to generate high-quality test scripts through prompts in simple English. ACE uses the app's live state to self-heal scripts, ensuring reduced maintenance overhead.

launches.name: OnCallClerk 2.0: Sounds Human
launches.tagline: Launch human-like AI phone agents in minutes
launches.description: Most AI phone agents still sound robotic. OnCallClerk doesn’t. We rebuilt the voice engine for sub-second latency, added built-in phone numbers, and launched a new SDK to build and customize AI phone agents. No messy stack. No glue code. Launch in minutes, handle calls 24/7, and capture leads instantly. Call it yourself in seconds, no signup required.

launches.name: risksim.ai
launches.tagline: Palantir-level supply chain intelligence for 5% the price.
launches.description: Three founders aged 17-18 built the supply chain intelligence platform that mid-market companies have always needed but could never afford. Live risk alerts personalized to your industry and sourcing countries. A landed cost engine that compares any sourcing origin in 30 seconds. AI supplier audits. Scenario simulation. Price increase PDF extraction. All connected to an AI that knows your business inside out. Palantir-level intelligence. Mid-market price. Launching May 1st.

launches.name: RFP360.ai
launches.tagline: AI-powered RFP management & proposal automation
launches.description: RFP360.ai brings AI-driven automation to the entire RFP lifecycle—unlike traditional tools that focus only on writing or procurement. Suppliers can discover opportunities, run Go/No-Go analysis, and generate compliant responses in minutes. Buyers can create RFPs, collect submissions, and evaluate vendors with AI scoring, risk detection, and structured insights. It replaces manual workflows with faster, smarter, and more data-driven decision-making.

launches.name: Desktop Pet
launches.tagline: A cute virtual pet that lives on your desktop 🐾
launches.description: 🐾 A transparent animated pet that walks around your desktop! ✨ FEATURES: • Multiple pets (Cat, Dog, Fox, Dragon, Unicorn, Robot) • 7-day free trial for premium pets ($2.99/mo) • Feed, play, pet, and cuddle your buddy • Walks freely around your screen • Talks with speech bubbles • Sleeps when tired • Drag anywhere on desktop 🎮 HOW IT WORKS: • Left click + drag = Move pet • Right click = Full menu • Works on Windows 10/11 • Requires Python 3.8+ 💰 Free to download, premium unlocks more pets!

launches.name: Bitgrain
launches.tagline: Design studio lighter than Figma & more flexible than Canva
launches.description: The first Beta version of Bitgrain & Bitgrain Studio is here! Most design tools feel the same. This one doesn’t. Bitgrain started with dithering, but now it’s a full template-based editor where you can create textured, standout visuals in minutes. Less clutter than Figma. More freedom than Canva.

launches.name: Ghosted: Smart Presence
launches.tagline: Pause media or lock your screen when you step away
launches.description: Ghosted is an “away mode” for your Mac. It uses on-device presence detection to pause media or lock your screen when you leave, then resumes when you return. No cloud, no accounts, no tracking. Just automatic control of your workspace without breaking focus.

launches.name: ScreenVeil
launches.tagline: Hide what shouldn’t be seen on your computer
launches.description: ScreenVeil helps you hide sensitive parts of your screen and place useful overlays on top of any app on macOS. It’s built for screen sharing, presentations, live streams, recordings, and everyday work when you need full control over what stays visible. You can add floating panels in seconds and save complete setups as presets. It’s a simple way to protect private information, keep notes visible, highlight content, or prepare reusable on-screen layouts for meetings and demos.

launches.name: TrafficClaw
launches.tagline: Have a conversation with your SEO & analytics data
launches.description: Your traffic dropped. Google Analytics says nothing useful. Search Console shows graphs. Cool. Now what? TrafficClaw lets you just ask - "Why did my traffic drop?" and actually get an answer. Backed by your real data, not some generic blog post advice. Connect GA4 + Search Console. Ask questions. Get fixes. That's it.

launches.name: Beauty Diagram
launches.tagline: Diagrams that don't look like they were auto-generated
launches.description: Beauty Diagram makes your Mermaid and PlantUML diagrams beautiful. Pick from curated themes, animate the flow, and export as SVG, PNG, or GIF. Use the web editor, CLI, or API to drop diagrams straight into docs, PRs, and presentations.

launches.name: PeekFocus
launches.tagline: One keystroke blurs everything behind your active window
launches.description: PeekFocus brings intentional focus to your Mac workflow. One keystroke dims or blurs everything behind your active window — so your screen matches the clarity you're going for. Three modes: your normal desktop, a calm ambient backdrop, or full focus where only your active window stays visible. Frosted blur, smooth dim, or custom wallpaper. Multi-display. Menu bar. No subscription. 7-day free trial. One-time purchase.

launches.name: MUSIXQUARE
launches.tagline: Turn any room into a surround system with your devices
launches.description: Got multiple phones or tablets lying around? MUSIXQUARE turns them into a synchronized surround sound system. Right in the browser, no install needed. Assign each device a role (Left, Right, Center, Subwoofer) and play the same track perfectly in sync across all of them. Share local files, YouTube videos, or even your system audio with everyone in the room. More Devices, Richer Sound. Free to start! Works on any device with a modern browser. Try it at musixquare.com

launches.name: PythonStarter - BTC Lightning Edition
launches.tagline: Ship a Python app. Get paid by humans or AIs with Bitcoin.
launches.description: The Python web app starter kit with Stripe + Bitcoin Lightning built in - because your next customer might be an AI!

launches.name: MLLPong
launches.tagline: A lightweight mock server for HL7 v2 messages over MLLP
launches.description: A lightweight mock server for HL7 v2 messages over MLLP — always-ACK, always-NACK, and rule-based smart handler

launches.name: Travassyx Platform
launches.tagline: Operational intelligence for virtual infrastructure
launches.description: Travassyx Platform transforms VMware and infrastructure data into a clear operational view. Monitor environment health, detect risks, forecast capacity and identify rightsizing opportunities in seconds. Built for infrastructure, DevOps and NOC teams that need visibility, control and smarter decisions. Try the live demo: https://travassyx.grupogigalink.com.br demo / demo123

launches.name: first simple test of comunications
launches.tagline: hashchat is an app to chat, privacy levels data you share
launches.description: HashChat: Communication is a Liberty. Connect via intent, not identity. Your contact is just a hashtag (e.g., #SellerACar). Start every chat at "Ghost Level" for total anonymity, then level up the trust whenever you choose. Zero trace: no phone, no email, no device, and no IP registration required. Just seamless, secure, and private semantic routing. Reclaim your freedom to chat. Launch now at: app.hashchat.app

launches.name: Zaron AI
launches.tagline: The AI workflow builder where cloud meets your local machine
launches.description: Zaron is an AI-first workflow automation platform. Describe what you want automated -Vega AI builds it. Connect Zaron Localhost and your cloud workflows can read your files, run your code, and use your local apps. 200+ integrations.

launches.name: PayNvoiceApp
launches.tagline: Get paid faster with simple invoices & client portals
launches.description: PayNvoiceApp helps freelancers send invoices, manage clients, and get paid directly via PayPal or bank — no platform fees.

launches.name: Poolr
launches.tagline: Every photo from every guest. Automatically.
launches.description: Poolr — Every photo from every guest. Automatically. Guests scan a QR code at your event — no app download needed — and every photo goes straight into a shared album. Weddings, birthdays, festivals, church events, corporate dos. The host gets everything. No chasing WhatsApp groups, no missing moments. Free to start → getpoolr.com

launches.name: Nellove
launches.tagline: The modern operating system for wedding planning
launches.description: Nellove is a modern wedding management platform for couples and planners. Join the waitlist for early access. Planning a wedding usually means drowning in scattered spreadsheets and endless email threads. Nellove changes that. We’ve built a modern, lightning-fast platform that centralizes your guest lists, budgets, and timelines into one intuitive workspace.

launches.name: Habitflow
launches.tagline: Beautifully designed, end-to-end encrypted habit tracking.
launches.description: HabitFlow’s biggest update is here: end-to-end encryption for everyone, import/export backups, a full UI overhaul, and new insights and statistics. Free stays strong for focused tracking, while Pro adds unlimited habits, yearly view, advanced insights, related-habit patterns, and deeper customization. New users can now start with a free 1-month Pro trial.

launches.name: verdant
launches.tagline: Visualize the gray emotions you've never been able to name
launches.description: Hello.I am kiyo.nezu.Creating quiet digital spaces where emotions can rest. Inspired by stars, music, and small moments. A free, poetic experience that moves Some feelings aren't simply "happy" or "sad." verdant is a quiet canvas for the emotions that live in between. Slide between love and hate, hope and despair, longing and letting go — and watch your inner landscape take shape in color. No judgment. No labels. Just honest.

launches.name: InspectFold
launches.tagline: Turn inspections into professional reports in minutes
launches.description: InspectFold helps you turn inspections into clean, professional reports in minutes. Capture everything during the inspection — checklists, photos, notes, and signatures — then generate a complete PDF instantly. No more scattered data or rewriting reports later. Built for inspectors, property managers, and professionals who want faster, clearer documentation.

launches.name: Rawsort
launches.tagline: Analyze CSV, JSON & Excel files  entirely in your browser
launches.description: Rawsort is a free data analysis toolkit that runs 100% locally in your browser. Drop a CSV, JSON, or Excel file and get instant charts, trend detection, and insights no upload, no account, no cloud. Not "we delete it after 24 hours" private. Actually never-touch-a-server private. Includes a CSV↔JSON converter, CSV merger, and tools for Stripe and Shopify exports. All free, all local.

launches.name: Scam Number Checker
launches.tagline: Free phone scam database — verify any number in seconds
launches.description: Scam Number Checker is a free lookup tool to instantly verify if a phone number has been reported as a scam. Our database combines 74,000+ complaints from the FTC's Do Not Call Registry with real-time community submissions across 63,000+ unique numbers. Search any number → see verdict, scam type, report count, and area code patterns. No signup. No paywall. Just answers. Built to protect families — especially seniors — from the $40B/year phone scam epidemic.

launches.name: Untouch
launches.tagline: Android releases on autopilot. Push code. Skip the DevOps.
launches.description: Untouch automates your entire Android release pipeline. Push to GitHub → cloud build → AES-256 signed AAB → Google Play. Supports Flutter, Kotlin, React Native & Expo. No YAML. No CI runners. No DevOps team. First build in under 5 minutes.

launches.name: VaultBit Sync
launches.tagline: The Zero-Knowledge SaaS for Grade VII Physical Custody.
launches.description: VaultBit Sync solves the "dangerous binary" of digital assets: counterparty risk of exchanges vs. the extreme vulnerability of home self-custody. We are an Asset-Light SaaS and Marketplace connecting institutional capital with Grade VII (UNE-EN 1143-1) physical vaults. Using Zero-Knowledge architecture, we digitize offline vault operators and allow HNWIs to secure physical backups and setup inheritance (Heritage Protocol) without ever exposing private keys. True financial sovereignty.

launches.name: GoalFlow Hub
launches.tagline: Track goals, build habits, and share progress in one place.
launches.description: GoalFlow is a unified productivity workspace designed to eliminate distractions. Tired of switching between scattered apps? GoalFlow integrates deep goal tracking, habit building, and a smart daily planner into one beautiful dashboard. Unique features include live link sharing for goal progress, actionable productivity analytics, and a focus-driven UI. Built with React and Supabase for creators who want to own their time and visualize their growth.
